run: K12-wide (keep-k=12) two-phase W50 static, cyberpunk ctx8192 greedy, n=2 byte-identical
binary: ds4 canonical chain md5 16a21de6 = canonical(21)+0027+0028(tokens)+0030(diag conf); built sm_86 on pod2; DS4_DIAG_CONF_LOG active
determinism: deliverable.html md5 identical across best-effort(771a39a8), conf(16a21de6) and prior baseline de18faa (7526 chars) -> 0030 is log-only, collapse reproduced exactly
pos_semantics: absolute; phase-2 decode starts at pos_first=85 (after ~85-tok re-prefill of [prompt+frozen]); decode-relative = pos-85
expert_out_l2: NaN under SSD-streaming (REAP-LOOP path) -> MAN/norm NOT reported, per patch 0030 caveat

mtp_acceptance_signal.status: NOT MEASURED — hardware/tooling block (declared, per coordinator contingency)
why: MTP acceptance needs --mtp <draft-gguf> + drafting; the binary hard-guards '--ssd-streaming is not compatible with --mtp yet'.

The 0008-dspark-mtp-streaming-probe-unsafe bypass (getenv DS4_MTP_STREAMING_UNSAFE) is NOT compiled into the on-pod 16a21de6 build: empirically DS4_MTP_STREAMING_UNSAFE=1 still prints the guard and never the 'MTP+streaming sperimentale' line.
The non-streaming --mtp path requires full device residency of the 86GB 2-bit model -> OOM on a 24GB RTX 3090 (confirmed by prior run runs/dspark/20260705_mtp_acceptance_pod3090/RISULTATI.md).
The separate MTP draft gguf (DeepSeek-V4-Flash-MTP, ~3.8GB, 'ds4-mtp.gguf') is absent on podA /root/models and absent from the R2 ds4-models bucket.
unblock_recipe: Rebuild 16a21de6 + apply 0008 bypass hunk (getenv DS4_MTP_STREAMING_UNSAFE) so --mtp works under --ssd-streaming; keep 0011 mask + 0012 sensor + 0030 conf.

Run K12 phase-2 with: DS4_MTP_STREAMING_UNSAFE=1 DS4_MTP_SPEC_DISABLE=1 DS4_MTP_PROBE=1 DS4_MTP_CONF_LOG=1 --mtp /root/models/ds4-mtp.gguf --mtp-draft 2 --ssd-streaming-cache-experts <=8GB; parse per-cycle (margin,drafted,committed) -> acceptance per pos; align to first-garbage.
mtp_acceptance_signal.reference_baseline_healthy: prior DSpark MTP-1 top-1 acceptance (UNMASKED, healthy domains, 2026-07-05, RTX3090): code 0.872, math 0.846 — not collapse-aligned, does not answer the pre-garbage lead question by itself.
mtp_acceptance_signal.expectation: acceptance_drop has NO 128-tok calibration window (can drop at token 1) and is cross-model (unmasked draft vs masked main), so it is the most promising early-warning; measuring it on the K12 collapse remains the recommended next step once the two dependencies above are met.
